# AUTO-GENERATED by split_acceptance_tests.py
# Each original test function was split into one function per top-level
# assertion so pytest reports per-check pass/fail counts.
import pytest
from sqlglot.dialects.hive import Hive

def test_hive_identifiers_can_start_with_digit_is_dialect_level_flag__a1():
    """
    The review change moves the "identifiers can start with digit" behavior to the Dialect
    level so it can be shared by both tokenizer and generator.

    This test asserts that Hive exposes the new dialect-level flag.
    """
    assert hasattr(Hive, 'identifiers_can_start_with_digit'), 'Hive dialect should define `identifiers_can_start_with_digit` at the Dialect level (so it can be passed into both tokenizer and generator).'

def test_hive_identifiers_can_start_with_digit_is_dialect_level_flag__a2():
    """
    The review change moves the "identifiers can start with digit" behavior to the Dialect
    level so it can be shared by both tokenizer and generator.

    This test asserts that Hive exposes the new dialect-level flag.
    """
    assert Hive.identifiers_can_start_with_digit is True, 'Hive.identifiers_can_start_with_digit should be True to allow identifiers starting with digits.'
